package rulecoverage

func PositiveToolAppeasementNoopTypeInProductionPackage() string {
    ruleID := "tool_appeasement_noop_type_in_production_package"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Production no-op or dummy types that appear to exist mainly to satisfy tooling instead of runtime behavior."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
